name: Betelgeuse
shortDescription: A massive red supergiant star nearing the end of its life.

name: Proxima Centauri
notableFeature: Closest star to Earth (after the Sun)
shortDescription: The nearest known star to the Sun and part of the Alpha Centauri system.

name: Sirius
notableFeature: Brightest star in the night sky
shortDescription: The brightest star visible from Earth, located in the constellation Canis Major.

name: Vega
notableFeature: One of the brightest stars in the sky
shortDescription: A bright star used as a reference point in astronomy.

name: Sun
shortDescription: The star at the center of our solar system that supports life on Earth.
